items.body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor` **Service directory:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/` **Triggered by:** PR #58230 by `@scbedd` ## What Changed The package was upgraded to api-version `2025-05-01-preview`, introducing five new resource types: - `AdvisorAssessmentResource` / `AdvisorAssessmentCollection` - `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource` / `AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection` - `AdvisorTriageResource` / `AdvisorTriageCollection` - `AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource` / `AdvisorTriageRecommendationCollection` - `AdvisorScoreEntityResource` / `AdvisorScoreEntityCollection` ## Gaps Found - The README `Examples` section contains only a generic link (`(aka.ms/redacted) there are no inline code snippets demonstrating any of the package's resource types - No sample test files exist for the five new resource types (`AdvisorAssessment`, `AdvisorResiliencyReview`, `AdvisorTriage`, `AdvisorTriageRecommendation`, `AdvisorScoreEntity`) - The CHANGELOG entry for `1.0.0-beta.6 (Unreleased)` only says "Upgraded api-version to 2025-05-01-preview" without listing the new resource types by name
📐 Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above. ### Step 1: Modify files **File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/CHANGELOG.md` — **edit** Replace the sparse `### Features Added` block under `1.0.0-beta.6 (Unreleased)` with an itemized list of new resource types: ```markdown ### Features Added - Upgraded api-version to `2025-05-01-preview`. - Added `AdvisorAssessmentResource` and `AdvisorAssessmentCollection` for managing Advisor assessments. - Added `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource` and `AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection` for managing resiliency reviews. - Added `AdvisorTriageResource` and `AdvisorTriageCollection` for managing triage sessions. - Added `AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource` and `AdvisorTriageRecommendationCollection` for managing triage recommendations. - Added `AdvisorScoreEntityResource` and `AdvisorScoreEntityCollection` for querying Advisor scores. ``` ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets Create the following sample test files. Use the existing files in `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/` (e.g. `Sample_SuppressionContractCollection.cs`) as style references. **File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorAssessmentCollection.cs` — **create** Provide a `[Test]` method that: 1. Creates an `ArmClient` using `DefaultAzureCredential` 2. Gets the default subscription via `client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync()` 3. Retrieves `AdvisorAssessmentCollection` via `subscription.GetAdvisorAssessments()` 4. Lists all assessments with `await foreach (AdvisorAssessmentResource item in collection.GetAllAsync())` Wrap the core snippet in `#region Snippet:AdvisorGetAssessments` / `#endregion`. **File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection.cs` — **create** Similar pattern using `subscription.GetAdvisorResiliencyReviews()` and `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource`. Snippet region name: `AdvisorGetResiliencyReviews`. **File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorTriageCollection.cs` — **create** Similar pattern using `subscription.GetAdvisorTriages()` and `AdvisorTriageResource`. Snippet region name: `AdvisorGetTriages`. **File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorScoreEntityCollection.cs` — **create** Similar pattern using `subscription.GetAdvisorScoreEntities()` and `AdvisorScoreEntityResource`. Snippet region name: `AdvisorGetScoreEntities`. ### Step 3: Verify README structure **File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/README.md` — **edit** The current `## Examples` section only contains a generic link. Replace the body of that section with snippet placeholders for each new sample, then run `Update-Snippets.ps1` to inject the actual code. Add these placeholders inside the `## Examples` section (after any existing content): ````markdown ### List Advisor Assessments ```C# Snippet:AdvisorGetAssessments ``` ### List Advisor Resiliency Reviews ```C# Snippet:AdvisorGetResiliencyReviews ``` ### List Advisor Triage Sessions ```C# Snippet:AdvisorGetTriages ``` ### List Advisor Score Entities ```C# Snippet:AdvisorGetScoreEntities ``` ```` ### Step 4: Validate Run these commands in order from the repository root. Each must succeed before proceeding: 1. `dotnet build sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/` 2. `dotnet test sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/ --filter TestCategory!=Live` 3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 advisor` — injects snippet code into README placeholders; verify with `git diff` 4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 advisor` — regenerates public API listing files (no new public types were added in this change, but run to confirm) 5. `dotnet format sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/`
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
items.title: [Advisor] Docs: Document new resource types added in api-version 2025-05-01-preview
